rulings.Case Title: DAVID ABRAMOVITZ ET AL VS. FARHAT BAJJALIYA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defedants Expert Witness Fire Investigator Geoff Hazards Deposition
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 11, 2018, Line 1. PLAINTIFFS DAVID ABRAMOVITZ, BLAIR BRIDGES, MYRIAM FALLON, ADRIENNE KNOLL, LAUREN LEDERMAN, LANCE SHANNON'S Motion To Compel Defedants Expert Witness Fire Investigator Geoff Hazard Deposition. GRANTED. Defendants shall produce Geoff Hazard for deposition on a mutually agreed date no later than April 30, 2018. =(501/ACM)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Protective Order To Preclude Taking The Deposition Of Plaintiffs Minor Children And Motion To Quash
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 11, 2018, Line 3. PLAINTIFF MICHELE ALESANDRO'S Motion For Protective Order To Preclude Taking The Deposition Of Plaintiffs Minor Children And Motion To Quash. GRANTED. The hearing date was requested prior to the motion cut-off and calendared by the Court. Based on evidence provided and representations made by Plaintiff's children shall not be deposed and shall not testify at trial. =(501/ACM)

rulings.Case Title: PRIYA SANGER ET AL VS. AHE AHN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendant Ahe Ahn To Set Aside Default And For Leave To Defend The Action
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 11, 2018, Line 4. DEFENDANT AHE AHN'S Motion To Set Aside Default And For Leave To Defend The Action. GRANTED. Defendant to file and serve answer no later than April 11, 2018 by 4:00 p.m. =(501/ACM)

rulings.Case Title: ST. PAUL MERCURY INSURANCE COMPANY VS. POPPI METAXAS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 11, 2018, Line 5. PLAINTIFF ST. PAUL MERCURY INSURANCE COMPANY'S Notice of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order. DENIED. Moving party failed to meet its initial burden to establish the probable validity of the claim on which the attachment is based. CCP 484.090. In this action the attachment may only be based on relief against transfer (CC 3439.07) for which no evidentiary showing or legal argument is made in the moving papers (Points and Authorities 5:1-6:12). =(501/ACM)

rulings.Case Title: STEAM LABS, INC. VS. MASASHI TAKAHASHI TAKAHASHI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: AMENDED MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 11, 2018, Line 6. DEFENDANTS MARGARET TAKAHASHI, MASASHI TAKAHASHI'S AMENDED MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain its burned under CCP 425.16. While Defendant points to factual allegations in the complaint which constitute protected activity, no claim asserted in any of the seven causes of action "arises out of" the protected activity. =(501/ACM)

rulings.Case Title: STEAM LABS, INC. VS. MASASHI TAKAHASHI TAKAHASHI ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 11, 2018, Line 6. DEFENDANTS MARGARET TAKAHASHI, MASASHI TAKAHASHI'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is overruled as to the causes of action for declaratory relief, breach of contract, specific performance and negligence. These causes of action are sufficiently alleged. Veracity of the allegations cannot be properly addressed on a demurrer. Demurrer to cause of action for breach of fiduciary duty is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts giving rise to fiduciary duty owed by defendant to plaintiff and breach of such duty. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to causes of action for fraud and negligent misrepresentation for Plaintiff to allege facts showing that the alleged damage resulted from the alleged misrepresentation or to allege any other damaged caused by such misrepresentation. =(501/ACM)

rulings.Case Title: DUKE PARTNERS II, LLC VS. KEYHAN MOHANNA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 11, 2018, Line 7. PLAINTIFF DUKE PARTNERS II, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication. DENIED. Moving party failed to shift its burden and provide competent, admissible evidence with foundation that Defendant is in possession of the premises. =(501/ACM)
